page.name: EFFECTS

pad1.name: ECHO
pad1.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'echo' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad1: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'echo' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Echo' & effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad2.name: REVERB
pad2.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'reverb' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad2: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'reverb' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 45% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Reverb' & effect_slider 1 1 45% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad3.name: DELAY
pad3.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'delay' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad3: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'delay' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Delay' & effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad4.name: CUT
pad4.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'cut' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad4: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'cut' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Cut' & effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad5.name: ECHO OUT
pad5.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'echo out' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad5: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'echo out' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 80% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Echo Out' & effect_slider 1 1 80% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad6.name: LOOP ROLL
pad6.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'loop roll' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad6: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'loop roll' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Loop Roll' & effect_slider 1 1 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad7.name: BACKSPIN
pad7.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'backspin' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad7: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'backspin' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Backspin' & effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_active 1 on

pad8.name: BRAKE
pad8.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'brake' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad8: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'brake' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Brake' & effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_active 1 on

pad9.name: SPIRAL
pad9.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'spiral' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad9: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'spiral' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Spiral' & effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad10.name: PHASER
pad10.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'phaser' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad10: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'phaser' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'Phaser' & effect_slider 1 1 50% & effect_active 1 on

pad11.name: BEATGRID
pad11.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'beatgrid' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.pad11: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'beatgrid' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off : effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_active 1 on : effect_select 1 'BeatGrid' & effect_slider 1 1 75% & effect_active 1 on

shift_pad1.name: VOCAL ECHO OUT
shift_pad1.query: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'echo out' ? effect_active 1 ? blink 500ms : off : off

page.shift_pad1: get_effect_name 1 & param_lowercase & param_equal 'echo out' ? effect_active 1 ? effect_active 1 off & effect_stems off : effect_stems 'vocal' & effect_slider 1 1 80% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on : effect_stems 'vocal' & effect_select 1 'Echo Out' & effect_slider 1 1 80% & effect_slider 1 2 50% & effect_active 1 on
